title: antonia obliqua
intro: Antonia obliqua, a flowering plant native to Central and South America, is a species of the family Rubiaceae. It is also known as the "antonia" or "antonia obliqua" due to the distinct shape of its leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Antonia obliqua include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, and it can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures.
